title: Product Intelligence to Quote Preview Relationship
purpose: Describe a directed dependency without transferring product truth ownership.
scope:
- Upstream: Product Intelligence.
- Downstream: Quote Preview.
- Transfer: verified product read model.
responsibilities:
- Preserve source authority.
- Keep the consumer read-only.
authority:
- Constitution Articles III, V and VII.
- ADR-005 and ADR-020.
boundaries:
- No ownership transfer.
- No consumer recalculation.
- Fail closed on missing evidence.
dependencies:
- Product read-model contract.
- Effective RuleSnapshot when applicable.
source_of_truth:
- Transferred concept owner: Product Intelligence.
- Relationship owner: architecture governance.
related_documents:
- Product Intelligence responsibility.
- Quote Preview contract.
status: `REFERENCE ONLY / NO SG-002 STANDALONE INSTANCE AUTHORITY`
traceability:
- Template: Canonical Dependency and Relationship Scaffold.
- SG-002 explicitly blocks standalone instances.
